documents.title: Pricing Model 2025
documents.content: Our pricing model includes Starter, Growth, and Enterprise tiers with annual discount options.

documents.title: Client Onboarding SOP
documents.content: Onboarding includes kickoff, stakeholder mapping, implementation planning, and 30-day review.

documents.title: HR Vacation Policy
documents.content: Employees receive 20 PTO days annually, plus local public holidays, with manager approval workflow.

documents.title: Quarterly Research Brief
documents.content: Latest research highlights growth in AI-assisted workflows and strong demand in regulated industries.
